body:
## Context
Members can record donations they've made (general, car blessing, Christmas caroling, etc.). Admin confirms payment was received.

## What to do

### Add to `src/actions/donations.ts`

**`recordDonation(prevState, formData)`**
- Validate: type (general/car_blessing/christmas_caroling/event_specific/other), amount, note (optional)
- Auth check — must be a member with a family
- Creates a payment record (type='donation', family_id from profile)
- `revalidatePath('/member')`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Members can record a donation for their own family
- [ ] Donation types are constrained
- [ ] Shows up in the member's payment history

## Dependencies
- #148 (payments table)
- #150 (validators)
title: Server actions: donations
